summary: Admin panel feature testing - All backend auth and CRUD tests passed (13/13). All frontend admin panel tests passed. Admin login, location management (create, edit, delete), and navigation all working correctly.
seed_data_creation: No additional seed data created. Admin user seeded on backend startup. Using existing 16 locations.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin panel fully functional. Backend auth with JWT working correctly. Admin can login, create, edit, and delete locations. All CRUD operations protected with Bearer token authentication. Frontend admin UI clean and responsive.

backend_tests_passed: POST /api/auth/login with correct credentials returns token and role=admin
GET /api/auth/me with valid token returns user info
POST /api/admin/locations with auth creates location (verified with GET)
PUT /api/admin/locations/{id} with auth updates location (verified with GET)
DELETE /api/admin/locations/{id} with auth deletes location (verified with 404)
frontend_tests_passed: Main map page loads with admin settings button (gear icon)
Clicking admin settings button navigates to /admin page
Admin login page displays with email and password inputs
After login, admin dashboard loads successfully
Each location card has edit and delete buttons
Add location button opens modal with empty form
Add location modal has all required fields (name, category, address, lat/lng, phone, description, hours, premium toggle)
Edit location button opens modal with pre-filled data
Edit modal shows existing location data correctly
Back button navigates from admin panel to main map
Logout button present in admin dashboard

auth_implementation_review.jwt_token: ✓ Correct - JWT with 24h expiration, includes user_id and email
auth_implementation_review.httponly_cookies: ✓ Correct - set_cookie with httponly=True on login
auth_implementation_review.bearer_token_support: ✓ Correct - supports both cookie and Authorization: Bearer header
auth_implementation_review.admin_role_check: ✓ Correct - all admin routes check user['role'] == 'admin'
auth_implementation_review.admin_seed: ✓ Correct - admin seeded on startup, password updated if changed
auth_implementation_review.401_on_missing_auth: ✓ Correct - all protected routes return 401 without token
